title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking - Don't Allow - Cancel [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Location permission "Don't Allow" followed by Find My Device "Cancel" returns to Poly Lens Menu (deprecated for iOS)
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android device.
2. During onboarding, when the location permission prompt appears, tap "Don't Allow".
5. Tap the Poly Lens Menu (hamburger menu or menu icon).
7. When the Find My Device screen appears, tap "Cancel".
8. Observe the screen the app navigates to.
expected: The app navigates back to the previous screen (Poly Lens Menu).
